title: (Bearish Signal) FOCS, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on Feb 10, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that FOCS's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 24 similar cases where FOCS's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 20 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $51.78 is above $46.01 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/08/21 - 02/10/21, the price experienced a +10% Uptrend. During the week of 02/03/21 - 02/10/21, the stock enjoyed a +4% Uptrend growth. 

https://preview.redd.it/854ub2mv1wg61.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=fc56cd60de3f1fab6b2d56a83531a5ae21a03164

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for FOCS moved out of overbought territory on February 10, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 24 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 20 of the 24 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 83%.

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the overbought zone for 4 days. The longer the ticker stays in the overbought zone, the sooner a price pull-back is expected.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where FOCS declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 71%.

FOCS broke above its upper Bollinger Band on January 08, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9229396-focus-financial-partners-inc-ordinary-shares-focs-52-58-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-february-10-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
